seoTitle: Won Wron vs Wonga Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Won Wron and Wonga Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Won Wron vs Wonga Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Won Wron and Wonga Park.
heading: Won Wron vs Wonga Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Won Wron, Victoria and Wonga Park, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Won Wron has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Wonga Park (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Won Wron or Wonga Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Won Wron has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Wonga Park scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Won Wron scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Wonga Park scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Won Wron or Wonga Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Won Wron has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
